content: Your wallet has insufficient funds. Please <1>top up your wallet</1> and try purchasing again.

comment.text: This key displays an error message informing the user that their wallet has insufficient funds and prompts them to top it up. It appears within a UI element (likely a dialog or alert) on the manual backup page, providing a direct link to the wallet top-up page. Translators should ensure the phrasing accurately conveys the need for a wallet top-up.

ai_spell_check_issues.description: The translation contains a grammatical inconsistency in person/form: it starts with the formal 'σας' (your) but switches to the informal 'σου' (your) and the informal imperative 'φόρτισε' (top up) within the tagged link. This creates a clash in tone.
ai_spell_check_issues.suggestion: Το πορτοφόλι σας έχει ανεπαρκή κεφάλαια. Παρακαλώ <1>φορτώστε το πορτοφόλι σας</1> και προσπαθήστε να αγοράσετε ξανά.

ai_spell_check_issues.description: The word 'maksā' in Latvian is a verb meaning 'to pay'. The noun for 'wallet' is 'maksa'. The sentence currently reads 'Your pay has insufficient funds'.
ai_spell_check_issues.suggestion: Jūsu maksa nepietiek līdzekļu. Lūdzu <1>papildiniet savu maku</1> un mēģiniet iegādāties vēlreiz.

ai_spell_check_issues.description: The closing tag </1> is present, but the opening tag <1> is placed incorrectly, wrapping 'a skúste nakupovať znova' instead of 'doplňte peňaženku'. This changes the clickable link area compared to the English source.
ai_spell_check_issues.suggestion: Vaša peňaženka má nedostatočný zostatok. Prosím, <1>doplňte peňaženku</1> a skúste nakupovať znova.

ai_spell_check_issues.description: Grammatical gender error: 'denarnica' is a feminine noun in Slovenian, so the possessive pronoun must be 'Vaša' instead of 'Vaš'.
ai_spell_check_issues.suggestion: Vaša denarnica nima dovolj sredstev. Prosim <1>nakladite denar na denarnico</1> in poskusite z nakupom znova.

ai_spell_check_issues.description: The phrase inside the <1> tag was not translated; it remains in English ('top up your wallet').
ai_spell_check_issues.suggestion: Portofoli juaj nuk ka fonde të mjaftueshme. Ju lutem <1>mbushni portofolin tuaj</1> dhe provoni sërish blerjen.
